title: Replace hero background with uploaded Querétaro aqueduct image

requirements.summary: Replace the HeroSection background image with the uploaded Querétaro aqueduct photo (new-qro-main.jpeg)
acceptanceCriteria: The file new-qro-main.jpeg is placed at frontend/public/assets/generated/new-qro-main.jpeg
HeroSection renders the new Querétaro aqueduct image as its full-screen background
The image covers the entire hero area (background-size: cover, background-position: center)
No previous background image is referenced in HeroSection

file_operations.description: Save the uploaded Querétaro aqueduct image (new-qro-main.jpeg) as a static asset at this exact path. This image shows the historic aqueduct with jacaranda trees and will serve as the new hero background.

Update the background image reference to use the exact workspace path frontend/public/assets/generated/new-qro-main.jpeg. Replace any existing background image URL or path. Ensure the styling maintains full viewport coverage with background-size: cover and background-position: center. Do not modify any other layout, overlay effects, text, or CTA button behavior.
